description: Apply medicinal-chemistry drug-likeness rules (rule_of_five, rule_of_cns, rule_of_veber, rule_of_oprea, rule_of_leadlike_soft, ...) to every molecule in the input library and write a per-rule pass/fail table plus pass_all/pass_any columns.
rules: read-only — parses molecules and writes a results CSV; mutates nothing remote
INPUT may be .csv/.tsv (smiles column), .sdf, or .txt (one SMILES per line)
RULES is a comma-separated list of named medchem rules
usage: Set INPUT (molecule file) and RULES (comma-separated rule names). Output: rules.csv.
limitation: Requires the medchem + datamol + rdkit + pandas stack (Python >=3.9); when absent the porter degrades gracefully and writes a stub so governance still runs offline. Unknown rule names error at runtime inside medchem.
